commands: vp install -g ./npm-global-vp-managed-pkg # Install via vp (creates managed shim)
npm install -g ./npm-global-vp-managed-pkg # npm install (should warn about conflict)
npm uninstall -g npm-global-vp-managed-pkg # npm uninstall should NOT remove the vp-managed shim
test -L $VP_HOME/bin/npm-global-vp-managed-cli && echo 'link exists' || echo 'link removed' # Shim should still exist
npm-global-vp-managed-cli # Verify the shim still works
